name: slickdeals-alerts
description: Self-hosted companion for Slickdeals saved-search RSS feeds: poll arbitrary saved-search RSS, deliver matches to Telegram + ntfy with sub-minute latency, and view everything from a unified dashboard.

scripts.fns:deploy: supabase functions deploy notifier && supabase functions deploy telegram-webhook && supabase functions deploy channel-verify && supabase functions deploy send-test && supabase functions deploy poll && supabase functions deploy refresh-scores
